name: Grilled Witloof Endive
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic into a paste and blend with the olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
If desired, season lightly with salt and pepper.
2. Slice the heads of endive lengthwise and brush with the oil mixture.
3. Grill about 4 minutes per side, basting occasionally with the oil.
(This is a wonderful accompaniment to grilled fish. The recipe will work equally well with radicchio.)
